outfit_info.theme: Layering and Practicality with Feminine Accents
outfit_info.outfit_description: The outfit combines a soft lavender lace dress with a practical olive green puffer coat, embodying a balanced urban and feminine look. Complemented by beige vintage check sandals and a raffia tote, it showcases comfort and style fit for a rainy day in the city.

model_attributes.body: Young, slender physique with natural posture radiating youthful confidence and relaxed charm.
model_attributes.pose: Standing straight with hands gently holding the tote bag in front, exuding calm and poise.
model_attributes.background: Urban rainy street scene with blurred passersby and colorful illuminated billboards creating a vibrant city atmosphere.

styling_techniques.P01074004: worn fully buttoned, sleeves slightly rolled up

outfit.P01057717: beige raffia-effect tote bag with purple accents
